tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Pick a tool and start generating
tools.intro: Choose a category to see every tool in that group — each tool lives in one place. Or search by keyword; partial words match names, slugs, and descriptions.
tools.searchPlaceholder: Search by keyword (e.g. caption, hook, title)…
tools.searchHintHub: Matches tool names, URL slugs, descriptions, and categories. Use the list below to browse every category.
tools.searchHintShort: Partial words match names, slugs, and descriptions.
tools.searchNoResults: No tools match that search. Try another word or open a category below.
tools.browseByCategorySub: Only categories that currently have tools listed here (cross‑platform; TikTok / YouTube / Instagram slug tools are under the platform hubs above).

categoryBlurbs.Captions: Post lines, on-screen text, and captions for Shorts, Reels, and feeds.
categoryBlurbs.Titles: Click-worthy titles for videos, Shorts, Reels, and carousel covers.
categoryBlurbs.Hooks: Scroll-stopping openers for the first 1–3 seconds.
categoryBlurbs.Ideas: Angles, topics, and prompts to plan your next posts.
categoryBlurbs.Scripts: Beats, outlines, and talking flows for short video.
categoryBlurbs.Bios: Profile bios and one-line positioning for creator accounts.
categoryBlurbs.Usernames: Handle and @username ideas that fit your niche.
categoryBlurbs.Hashtags: Tag sets and discovery-friendly hashtags for reach.
categoryBlurbs.Descriptions: Long-form descriptions, SEO blurbs, and channel copy.

platformBlurbs.tiktok: Caption, hook, hashtag, and idea tools built for TikTok slugs.
platformBlurbs.youtube: Titles, tags, descriptions, and Shorts-focused generators.
platformBlurbs.instagram: Reels, Stories, bios, and carousel copy under instagram-* tools.

learnAi.title: Learn to Talk to AI
learnAi.subtitle: Guides on how to write better prompts, use frameworks, and get more from ChatGPT and other AI tools.
learnAi.cardSubtitle: Improve your prompts and get better AI results.

how-to-talk-to-ai.title: How to Talk to AI: A Beginner's Guide
how-to-talk-to-ai.description: Learn the basics of communicating with AI. Clear instructions get better results.

how-to-prompt-chatgpt.title: How to Prompt ChatGPT for Better Results
how-to-prompt-chatgpt.description: Get more useful outputs from ChatGPT with structured prompts and clear instructions.

prompt-tips.title: 10 Prompt Tricks That Actually Work
prompt-tips.description: Proven techniques to get better AI outputs: role-playing, examples, constraints, and more.

prompt-frameworks.title: Prompt Frameworks: ROLE, TASK, CONTEXT, FORMAT
prompt-frameworks.description: Use the RTCF framework to structure prompts for consistent, high-quality AI outputs.

common-prompt-mistakes.title: Common Prompt Mistakes and How to Fix Them
common-prompt-mistakes.description: Avoid vague prompts, missing context, and unclear formats. Fix these to get better AI results.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noProjectsHint: Save content from tools to projects to organize your work.
dashboard.noFavoritesHint: Save results from any tool to see them here.
dashboard.noHistoryHint: Generate something to see it here.

growthMission.introP1: These are daily off-site posting tasks (Reddit, X, Quora) picked from your high-value pages. They help you grow traffic and keep a streak.
growthMission.introP2: How: click Run task → copy the draft in the pop-up → post on that platform → then mark Done in the pop-up. Don’t want a row? Click Hide — it only hides on this device today.
growthMission.introStorage: Hide is not saved on our servers — there is no task table to delete. The list is recomputed daily. Only your browser stores today’s skipped row IDs; old dates are cleared automatically so nothing piles up.
growthMission.title: Today's Growth Mission
growthMission.allTasksHidden: All tasks are hidden for today. They reset tomorrow.
growthMission.reminderBody24h: You still have unfinished tasks — don't break your streak!

hookGenerator.title: Hook Generator
hookGenerator.description: Generate punchy first lines for TikToks, Reels, Shorts and carousels so people stop and actually listen.
hookGenerator.placeholder: Example: Instagram Reels for small business owners, showing how to turn one video into 5 posts.
hookGenerator.emptyMessage: Your hook ideas will appear here. Keep them short enough to say in 2–3 seconds.
hookGenerator.howItWorks1: Enter your video or post topic above.
hookGenerator.howItWorks2: Generate hooks that stop the scroll.
hookGenerator.howItWorks3: Copy and post—use in your script or caption.
hookGenerator.proTip1: Say your hook out loud; if it's hard to say, it's hard to listen to.
hookGenerator.proTip2: Record the hook twice: one calm, one high‑energy—test which performs better.
hookGenerator.proTip3: Match the hook to the first frame visually so they feel like one idea.

titleGenerator.title: Title Generator
titleGenerator.description: Generate click‑worthy titles for YouTube, TikTok, Reels and Shorts based on your topic or niche.
titleGenerator.placeholder: Example: how to edit vertical videos faster using CapCut templates
titleGenerator.emptyMessage: Your title ideas will appear here. Use them as a starting point, then tweak for your voice.
titleGenerator.howItWorks1: Enter your video topic or niche above.
titleGenerator.howItWorks2: Generate title ideas you can use as-is or tweak.
titleGenerator.howItWorks3: Copy and post—paste into your upload screen or planning doc.
titleGenerator.proTip1: Write for humans first, algorithm second.
titleGenerator.proTip2: Front‑load the most interesting word in the first 3–4 words.
titleGenerator.proTip3: Pair strong titles with clean thumbnails or first frames.

tiktokIdeaGenerator.title: TikTok Idea Generator
tiktokIdeaGenerator.description: Generate viral TikTok content ideas for any niche.
tiktokIdeaGenerator.placeholder: Example: fitness coach, cooking tips, travel vlogs
tiktokIdeaGenerator.emptyMessage: Your content ideas will appear here.
